submitted_payload.suggested_entry: - [Ralph Workflow](https://codeberg.org/RalphWorkflow/Ralph-Workflow) — free open-source workflow layer for unattended coding runs that aims to hand back finished, tested code ready to review instead of another confident summary

why_this_action: Shared artifacts still show distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion as the live bottleneck, Apollo is already inside its measurement window until 2026-05-30, Reddit remains structurally blocked, and no-fluff/awesome-vibe-coding was one of the last prepared high-priority curator targets with a legitimate public email fallback that could be executed immediately.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.md: Codeberg remains flat and is still the primary success gate
market_intelligence_latest.json: reuse canonical positioning and comparison framing instead of inventing a new pitch
curator_contact_discovery_latest.json: no-fluff had a verified public email fallback ready to use
curator_outreach_queue_latest.json: no-fluff/awesome-vibe-coding was prepared but unsent

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, issue/PR invitation, or a new qualified backlink path that sends evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo

repairs_applied.change: Updated no-fluff/awesome-vibe-coding from prepared to sent_via_email_fallback so future runs do not duplicate this outreach.
Marked the prepared no-fluff contact path as executed so the discovery artifact stays reusable and truthful.
Appended the outreach record so future distribution runs can dedupe against this live contact.
